proposals.title: 7 Best Marketing Automation Platforms for Small Businesses in 2026 (Compared)
proposals.issue: Weak CTA with no direct action to schedule a consultation or claim an offer
proposals.proposal: Add a bold CTA box at the end of the article: 'Ready to automate your marketing? Schedule your FREE 30-minute strategy call with Nataliia → [Schedule Now](/services/marketing-automation)'
